body_txt: Oh no. You've just become an Accidental Pervert . You may have seen the girl naked, grabbed her somewhere , wandered into the wrong locker room , or anything similar—and now she's gonna kick you into next Tuesday! A common tactic of the Tsundere , this typically involves an instant physical punishment, often using a Megaton Punch , Groin Attack , or Hyperspace Mallet , although more drawn-out sequences and talking-downs are also possible. The most frequent target is the Accidental Pervert , and usually she doesn't realize it's Not What It Looks Like , although in many cases, her attitude suggests that she wouldn't care . However, because All Men Are Perverts , the man should by default enjoy whatever he just saw or did, so the Laser-Guided Karma still works. This setup relies on both Laser-Guided Karma and Double Standard: Abuse, Female on Male to work. Forgiving the Accidental Pervert is the subversion of this version of the trope. Though most associated with the Accidental Pervert , girls can just as well go after people who were intentionally doing it (i.e. Copping a Feel , Girl Watching , etc.). Generally, the revenge is more deserved for the likes of the Chivalrous Pervert , Covert Pervert , Oblivious Pervert , and especially the Predatory Pervert . On the other end of the spectrum, it can also happen to a guy who really didn't do anything perverted to begin with, though that's a separate trope: Unprovoked Pervert Payback . This may prove ineffective if the recipient is Too Kinky to Torture and/or Doesn't Mind a Beating . Compare Violent Romantic Rejection for the romance-based equivalent. noreallife
